fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Team Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the team to which the task is assigned.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the salesperson assigned to the task.

fields.name: Campaign No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the campaign to which the task is linked.

fields.name: Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact linked to the task.

fields.name: Opportunity No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the opportunity to which the task is linked.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the Task.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the task should be started. There are certain rules for how dates should be entered found in How to: Enter Dates and Times.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the task. There are five options: Not Started, In Progress, Completed, Waiting and Postponed.

fields.name: Priority
fields.tooltip: Specifies the priority of the Task. There are three options:

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the task.

fields.name: Closed
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the task is closed.

fields.name: Date Closed
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date the task was closed.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a comment has been assigned to the task.

fields.name: Canceled
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the task has been canceled.

fields.name: Contact Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact to which this task has been assigned.

fields.name: Campaign Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the campaign to which the task is linked.

fields.name: Contact Company No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact number of the company for which the contact involved in the task works.

fields.name: Contact Company Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the company for which the contact involved in the task works.

fields.name: Recurring
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the Task occurs periodically.

fields.name: Recurring Date Interval
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date formula to assign automatically a recurring Task to a Salesperson or Team.

fields.name: Calc. Due Date From
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date to use to calculate the date on which the next Task should be completed.

fields.name: Opportunity Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the opportunity related to the task. The description is copied from the opportunity card.

fields.name: Start Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when the Task of the Meeting type should be started.

fields.name: Duration
fields.tooltip: Specifies the duration of the Task of the Meeting type.

fields.name: All Day Event
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the Task of the Meeting type is an all-day event, which is an activity that lasts 24 hours or longer.

fields.name: Location
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location where the meeting will take place.

fields.name: Organizer To-do No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the organizer's task. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Interaction Template Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the interaction template that you have selected.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the language that is used when translating specified text on documents to foreign business partner, such as an item description on an order confirmation.

fields.name: Attachment No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the linked attachment is inherited or unique.

fields.name: Subject
fields.tooltip: Specifies the subject of the task. The subject is used for e-mail messages or Outlook meetings that you create.

fields.name: Unit Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost, in LCY, of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Unit Duration (Min.)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the duration of the interaction.

fields.name: No. of Attendees
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of attendees for the meeting. click the field to view the Attendee Scheduling card.

fields.name: Attendees Accepted No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of attendees that have confirmed their participation in the meeting.

fields.name: Completed By
fields.tooltip: Specifies the salesperson who completed this team task.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of when the Task should end. There are certain rules for how dates should be entered. For more information, see How to: Enter Dates and Times.

fields.name: Ending Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time of when the Task of the Meeting type should end.

fields.name: Team To-do
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the Task is meant to be done team-wide. Select the check box to specify that the Task applies to the entire Team.

fields.name: Send on finish
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the meeting invitation task will be sent when the Create Task wizard is finished.

fields.name: Segment Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the segment related to the task. The description is copied from the segment card.

fields.name: Team Meeting Organizer
fields.tooltip: Specifies who on the team is the organizer of the task. You can modify the value in this field with the appropriate name when the to-do is for a team.

fields.name: Activity Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the task activity.

fields.name: Wizard Contact Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies a contact name from the wizard.

fields.name: Wizard Campaign Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the campaign that is related to the task. The description is copied from the campaign card.

fields.name: Wizard Opportunity Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the Opportunity that is related to the Task. The description is copied from the Campaign card.
